name: Godzilla LE
description: Keith Elwin, 2021, and most of the floor will tell you it's the best modern table here. Bring the building down, run Tank multiball, chase the heat ray. Deep and mean. Worth the wait while someone else finishes their ball.

photo.alt: Beercade arcade floor at night, pinball machines lit.

name: The Addams Family
description: The best-selling pinball machine ever built, and the one regulars still queue for. Thing flips the ball out of a locked box, The Power pulls the playfield dark, and the Bookcase hides the good shots. 1992, and it hasn't aged. Mind the Swamp.

photo.alt: Beercade arcade floor at night, pinball machines lit.

name: Venom
description: Stern's 2023 table, and it does not let up. Three Venoms to take down, a symbiote that keeps changing hosts, and Carnage multiball when the whole thing tips over. Flip fast or it's over quick. You'll lose the symbiote. That's fine.

photo.alt: Beercade arcade floor at night, pinball machines lit.

name: KISS
description: Stern's 2015 run at the loudest band in pinball. Demon, Starchild, Catman, Spaceman, each with a shot to light. Load the ramps, bring the members on, hang on through the multiball. The backbox out-volumes the bar. Pick a member and play.

photo.alt: Beercade arcade floor at night, pinball machines lit.
